meaning: adj.分为百度的,百分度的,摄氏温度的
examples: This thermometer is calibrated by centigrade.
The boiling point of water is 100 degrees centigrade.
The temperature dropped to minus ten degrees centigrade.
However overnight temperatures dropped to minus nine centigrade and with a further deterioration forecast on Saturday, the game was called off.
Temperatures hover around 10 degrees centigrade during winter days, although if you are lucky, experiencing the Coliseum with a dusting of snow is magical.
